titleEn: Syngenta Signs MoU to Be Strategic Partner in India’s First Open-Data Agricultural Ecosystem Annam.AI
titleZh: 先正达签署谅解备忘录，成为印度首个开放数据农业生态系统Annam.AI的战略合作伙伴
summaryZh: 印度农业面临气候多变、病虫害严重、小农户占比高等挑战。Annam.AI项目由印度政府支持，联合Google等科技伙伴，旨在构建基于开放数据的全国农业智能骨干网，为农民提供实时、个性化、多语言的AI农事建议。先正达作为战略合作伙伴，将利用其研发和农艺专长，构建作物健康、病虫害预测和热应激模型。该项目有望推动精准农业和气候韧性，对智慧畜牧行业在数据共享、AI应用和生态合作方面具有重要参考价值。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了开放数据、AI和公私合作在农业中的前沿应用，对智慧畜牧行业在构建数据共享平台、推动精准养殖和气候适应性管理方面具有重要借鉴意义。
contentFull: By Syngenta Share Syngenta Country Head for France Anne Azam (2nd from right) with India’s Minister of Commerce and Industry Piyush Goyal (3rd from left) and Annam Principal Scientific Advisor to the Government of India Dr. Ajay Sood (3rd from right) at the signing ceremony. India’s agriculture sector is a global powerhouse, uniquely characterized by its massive scale, vast arable land, diverse agro-climatic zones and rich biodiversity. These strengths have propelled the country to become one of the world’s leading producers of crops such as rice and wheat. However, farmers in the country face significant challenges – from erratic monsoons, severe droughts and unseasonal rains compounded by El Nino, to pests and diseases that destroy an estimated 30 percent of crops annually. More than 80 percent of India’s estimated 150 million farming households are composed of smallholder farmers who operate on less than two hectares of land. This limits economies of scale, sets obstacles to the wider adoption of advanced technologies and could widen a systemic gap between large commercial agricultural operations and the bulk of its farming population. Providing India’s farmers with free, real-time and personalized agricultural intelligence – at scale – could transform the country’s agriculture. This vision is at the heart of an ambitious program called Annam.AI, which aims to build a nationwide agricultural intelligence backbone based on open data, that enables precision agriculture and fosters climate resilience. This would provide India’s farmers hyperlocal, AI-powered advisories that integrate crop intelligence, real-time microclimate data and multilingual engagement tools. Annam.AI (Alliance for Next-gen Nourishment through Agriculture Modernization, and denoting “food” in Sanskrit language) is backed by the Government of India through the Ministry of Education, the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, global technology partners such as Google, and is driven by IIT Ropar, a premier engineering and technology university in Punjab that is part of the prestigious Indian Institutes of Technology (IIT) system. Syngenta, a global leader in agricultural innovation with a long-standing presence in India, has announced it has signed a Memorandum of Understanding to be a strategic partner in the Annam.AI program, at an event in Nice, France attended by India’s Prime Minister Narendra Modi and France’s President Emmanuel Macron. Syngenta is to leverage its R&D and agronomic expertise in building accurate crop health, pest forecasting and heat stress models. Annam.AI presents a unique opportunity to contribute to a transformative, digital foundation for Indian agriculture that will benefit more than 600 million people in this country. We are deeply honored to work with many talented and committed people in India’s government and universities, as well as with other innovation leaders in fulfilling this vision.” 0 1 5 Syngenta Signs MoU to Be Strategic Partner in India’s First Open-Data Agricultural Ecosystem Annam.AI Subscribe Today For Subscribe Syngenta is one of the world’s leading agriculture companies. translationZh: 先正达法国国家负责人Anne Azam（右二）与印度工商部长Piyush Goyal（左三）及印度政府首席科学顾问Annam博士Ajay Sood（右三）在签约仪式上。印度农业是全球强国，其独特之处在于规模庞大、耕地广阔、农业气候区多样、生物多样性丰富。这些优势使印度成为水稻和小麦等作物的世界主要生产国之一。然而，印度农民面临重大挑战——从厄尔尼诺加剧的季风异常、严重干旱和反季节降雨，到每年毁掉约30%作物的病虫害。印度约1.5亿农户中，超过80%是经营土地不足两公顷的小农户。这限制了规模经济，阻碍了先进技术的广泛采用，并可能扩大大型商业化农业经营与大多数农业人口之间的系统性差距。为印度农民提供免费、实时、个性化的农业情报——并实现规模化——可能改变该国的农业面貌。这一愿景正是名为Annam.AI的雄心勃勃计划的核心，该计划旨在构建一个基于开放数据的全国农业智能骨干网，实现精准农业并增强气候韧性。这将为印度农民提供超本地化、由AI驱动的农事建议，整合作物智能、实时微气候数据和多语言互动工具。Annam.AI（通过农业现代化实现下一代营养联盟，在梵语中意为“食物”）由印度政府通过教育部、农业和农民福利部支持，并得到Google等全球技术合作伙伴的支持，由旁遮普邦的顶尖工程技术大学——印度理工学院罗巴尔分校（IIT Ropar）主导。全球农业创新领导者先正达在印度拥有长期业务，宣布已在法国尼斯签署谅解备忘录，成为Annam.AI计划的战略合作伙伴。印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪和法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙出席了该活动。先正达将利用其研发和农艺专长，构建准确的作物健康、病虫害预测和热应激模型。更多先正达内容：数字农业 2026年5月19日 先正达与QuantumBasel合作深化研发能力 作者：先正达|2026年5月19日 数据管理 2026年4月22日 先正达部署Tetra OS，通过工业规模数据自动化加速科学发现 作者：先正达|2026年4月22日 分析 2026年3月7日 SAP与先正达建立合作伙伴关系，规模化AI辅助农业 作者：先正达|2026年3月
author: Matt Hopkins
contentHtml:
Agricultural innovation leader to contribute with agronomic expertise in building accurate crop health, pest forecasting and heat stress models.
The post Syngenta Signs MoU to Be Strategic Partner in India’s First Open-Data Agricultural Ecosystem Annam.AI appeared first on Global Ag Tech Initiative.
